---
title: "Title"
subtitle: "Subtitle"
image: media/veldman_mri.jpg
# author:
#   - name: "Nathan Muncy"
#     email: "nmuncy@nd.edu"
    # affiliations:
    #   - name: University of Notre Dame
    #     address: E308 Corbett Family Hall
    #     city: South Bend
    #     state: IN
    #     postal-code: 46556
date: today
toc: false
execute:
  freeze: auto
about: # https://quarto.org/docs/websites/website-about.html
  template: jolla
  image-width: 15em
---

## Welcome

Welcome
